_comment: harness-engineering jq-merge-schema.json v0.1.0 — describes how install.sh merges settings.json.template into user's existing ~/.claude/settings.json without clobbering user-specific keys.
description: Use 'jq -s' deep merge: user keys win for scalar fields, harness hooks are APPENDED (not replaced) to existing hooks arrays. Atomic backup written before any mutation.

atomic_backup.description: Written BEFORE merge. Restore with: cp <backup_path> ~/.claude/settings.json

dry_run.description: Run dry-run diff first; user must confirm before atomic write

install_sh_steps: 2. Dry-run diff (show user what will change)
3. Prompt user: 'Apply harness hooks to settings.json? [y/N]'

list.name: stop-handoff-writer.sh
list.description: Writes handoff MD at session end for cross-session continuity

list.name: pre-tool-handoff-read-gate.sh
list.description: Enforces handoff read before any file mutation or bash execution

list.name: pre-tool-handoff-semantic-gate.sh
list.description: Semantic similarity gate: blocks writes that diverge from current handoff intent

list.name: user-prompt-l42-workflow-trigger-gate.sh
list.description: L42 enforcement: detects trigger keywords and injects workflow MD read

list.name: pre-tool-doc-sync-sop-enforce.sh
list.description: Enforces doc-sync SOP before Bash invocations that may trigger archival

list.name: post-tool-chmod-ci-gate.sh
list.description: Validates file permissions and CI-critical attributes after writes

list.name: session-start-layer0-health.sh
list.description: Layer 0 5-element health check at session start; blocks if critical files missing

list.name: pre-tool-plan-quality-gate.sh
list.description: Quality gate for plan writes: enforces 5-element structure and PUA bar

idempotency_note: jq deep merge is idempotent for scalar fields; hook arrays will grow on repeated runs. install.sh should deduplicate by checking if harness hook command string already exists in array before appending.
